---
name: Data correction
about: Report an incorrect peak, coordinate, rating, or trailhead
title: "[data] "
labels: data
---

**Peak / record affected**
e.g. "Mount Whitney" or trailhead "Onion Valley".

**Current value**
What the dataset currently says.

**Correct value**
What it should be.

**Source**
Cite an authoritative source (USGS GNIS, the official SPS list, USFS/NPS, etc.)
so the correction can be verified. Please do **not** paste copyrighted source
documents — a link or citation is enough.
